engagements.Summary Notes: 3 drums, 200kg each shipped at $6.50/kg. Potential for 50MT per year when Este audit completed.
Pricing and packaging information has been sent. 1-2 MT at price $6.0/kg by LCL Sea in HDPE drums each with 200 kgs. material. We should hear back early next week.
Have offered 2MT as of Feb 14. Waiting for response by next week. Customer interested in 33MT annually

We gave a quote of $5.2/kg CIF Savannah in IBC drums packing with qty. 17MT per FCL. Delivery in June 2019. However their customer came back with feedback tat price is far too high and claimed  the competitive price in the US is in the range of $3100/MT.
Sample sent
Once the COC is done, can talk about larger order for Estee Lauder. However we will need the capacity to deliver. At present Este lauder orders 10,000 KG.
We have received order for 6 MT.  Shipment under process
Has a customer who could potentially order 2,000,000 - 16,000,000 6"x12"x1.25" panels of NaturoMer for

Mike Bolos will be sending actual sample. 1. The dimension: of the product needed is 600 mm X 355 mm X 12 mm.
2. Deskview has requested weight tolerance close to 2kg. The biocomposite top weight will fall in the range of 2.04 - 2.41 Kgs.
3. As our biocomposite plant erection is in the last leg, we expect to provide Deskview with white gloss coated biocomposite Deskview top at earliest. 
4. They require high quality gloss finish, a product that satisfies California prop 65 standard for Pthalates and lead.
Exploring the following -1.Buying soy binder from us. 2. Partner with the pilot plant for material research purposes. 3. Form a manufacturing partnership down the road.
Customer has asked for details on cost and supply. They require 200kg per year. Quote and SDS sent. Waiting for response.
Sample sent to Dow. Waiting for result
Quote, SDS and specs sent for Crotonaldehyde CIF Los Angeles.
engagements.Packaging: 200kg x 80 nos of UN  approved HDPE drums(16MT per FCL)

engagements.Summary Notes: Sent quote and specs CIF Charleston.

Quote was sent for $ 1215/-PMT CFR Wilmington and$ 1150/- PMT CFR New York. Stephanie mentioned her customer found the price very high and waiting for her response on the specific price they opted for.
2 shipped in Jan at $950 MT.  Have now offered $800 PMT FOB Mumbai. Has asked If we can improve pricing if he offers 8 POs spaced out 2 per week over 4 weeks
engagements.Sample Outcome: We subsequesntly quoted $1150 and then $980 both of which were not accepted. Clains to have offer at  $925.

Customer has been sent samples of Ethanol and 1,3 BG on Feb 28. Cutomer has indicated that if samples are ok, they will order 50kg to start with.  Waiting for customer to confirm import license. Vendor agreement and supporting documents sent

We have offered quote for perf grade alcohol iso lot qty. 20 kl +-5% at $1350/KL CIF St.Louis, USA. 
Madhu has indicated that the COSMOS certified Perf Grade Ethanol prices offered by us to be very competitive. we have been told that there could be some duties other than the standard duties. Omni is also evaluating this product from regulatory point of view.
Talks in progress with Mr. craig Kenesky, Attorney in NY and Seth Helfgott in CA to explore feasibility of Licensing and of forming subsidiary in the US

The biocomposite top weight will fall in the range of 2.04 - 2.41 Kgs. 3. As our biocomposite plant erection is in the last leg, we expect to provide Deskview with white gloss coated biocomposite Deskview top at earliest. 4. tracker.Comment: Quote requested for 1 X ISOTANK of Ethyl Acetate CIF Santo Tomas, Guatemala. Customer asked for 90 days B/L. We have offered 30 days which has been accepted. Credit check was obtained through two independent companies, Experian and Dun & Bradstreet. We offered a quote of $ 1110/- PMT CFR Santo Tomas Gautamela and they came back saying they have an offer of $1040 PMT.

tracker.Comment: Note from Craig : We have already filed patent in US and India.  Additionally, the top tier geographies for life science patent filings are Europe, Japan, and China.  Depending on how long the patent application is, and thus, how much your translators charge, these filings could cost as much as $60,000.  Those countries are enough to capture the top value in the world market.  If you plan more globally, the next tier that he suggests is South Korea, Canada, and Australia.
tracker.Description: Note from Craig : We have already filed patent in US and India. Additionally, the top tier geographies for life science patent filings are Europe, Japan, and China. Depending on how long the patent application is, and thus, how much your translators charge, these filings could cost as much as $60,000. Those countries are enough to capture the top value in the world market. If you plan more globally, the next tier that he suggests is South Korea, Canada, and Australia.
